data.name: Milking Mira!
data.detailed_description:
傲慢、自大、自私。米拉是個難搞的女人，她永遠只接受最好的東西。雖然她的日常活動是在咖啡館工作、開豪車和啜飲含羞草雞尾酒，但這工作與她奢華的生活方式形成鮮明對比。我們需要一位經驗豐富的農場老手來處理她的要求並確保最大奶產量！

當你點擊給米拉擠奶時，你將提升她的等級並解鎖各種道具來優化你的經營。從全自動擠奶機到特殊育種計劃，你需要找到最佳組合來讓她保持滿足和高產！

你有能力應付米拉這個燙手山芋嗎？

遊戲特色

  • 可解鎖25種以上道具，包括一臺擠奶機。

  • 身體改造選項，例如懷孕或增大胸部。

  • 搖晃的物理效果！

  • 原創配樂，收錄多款Tentakero遊戲的歌曲。

  • 待發現的隱藏祕密！

data.short_description: 口渴了嗎？一頭優質奶牛娘已抵達你的農場，是時候在這款有趣且令人上癮的點擊遊戲中收集那奶油般的美味了！擠得越多，解鎖越多，所以抓住那些乳房開始工作吧！
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 日文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7
  • 處理器: Intel i3
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 集成顯卡
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: 板載聲卡
  • 備註: 超寬屏顯示器用戶可能會注意到一些問題，但遊戲仍可正常遊玩。
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7

data.name: Milking Mira!
data.detailed_description:
Sassy, cocky, selfish. Mira is a difficult lady and won't settle for less than the best. While her normal routine involves working at a cafe, driving expensive cars, and sipping mimosas, this job starkly contrasts her luxurious lifestyle. It's going to take an experienced farm hand to handle her demands and ensure maximum milk output!



As you click to milk Mira, you'll increase her rank and unlock various items to enhance your operation. From fully automated milking machines to a special breeding program, you'll need to find the best combinations to keep her satisfied and productive!

Do you have what it takes to handle a handful of Mira?

Features

  • 25+ items to unlock, including a Milking Machine.
  • Body modifiers such as pregnancy or larger breasts.
  • Jiggle Physics!
  • Original Soundtrack featuring songs from various Tentakero games.
  • Hidden secrets to discover!

data.short_description: Are you thirsty? A prime hucow has arrived at your farm and it's time to collect that creamy goodness in this fun and addictive dairy clicker game! The more you milk, the more you unlock, so grab those udders and get to work!
data.supported_languages: English, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Spanish - Latin America, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Windows 7
  • Processor: Intel i3
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Integrated
  • Storage: 6 GB available space
  • Sound Card: OnBoard
  • Additional Notes: Ultrawide monitors may notice some issues but the game should still be playable.
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10
  • Processor: Intel i5
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Integrated
  • Storage: 6 GB available space
  • Sound Card: OnBoard
  • Additional Notes: Ultrawide monitors may notice some issues but the game should still be playable.
